description: Animated ladder method (division method) for computing LCM. Takes two or more positive integers (or variable references) and visualizes the step-by-step division process.
utility: Visualize LCM computation using the ladder/division method

arguments.name: numbers
arguments.description: Two or more positive integers or variable references to compute LCM for

alternates.description: LCM of variables from inputnumber controls
LCM of multiple numbers with custom cell sizing

examples.scenario: LCM ladder with input number controls
examples.expression:
inputnumber(at(5.1, 16.8), "a", value(41), size(4), display("A"))
inputnumber(at(5.2, 26.1), "b", value(18), size(4), display("B"))
ladderlcm_1 = ladderlcm(at(9.2, 19.5), view(13.9, 13.3), a, b)
playaction(at(5.4, 35.8), ladderlcm_1, display("Play"), fs(26))

examples.scenario: LCM of four numbers with custom view
